demo.title: gitlawb-quickstart.sh
demo.code:
# Install gl CLI
npm install -g @gitlawb/gl

export GITLAWB_NODE=https://node.gitlawb.com

# Create cryptographic identity (Ed25519 → DID)
gl identity new
gl register

MY_DID=$(gl identity show)

# Create a repo, clone, and push
gl repo create my-project --description "first gitlawb repo"
git clone "gitlawb://$MY_DID/my-project" && cd my-project
git config user.name "$MY_DID"
echo "hello" > index.html
git add . && git commit -m "initial commit" && git push origin main

# Open a PR, review, and merge
git checkout -b feature/readme
echo "# my-project" > README.md
git add . && git commit -m "add readme" && git push origin feature/readme
gl pr create my-project --head feature/readme --base main --title "Add README"
gl pr review my-project 1 --status approved
gl pr merge  my-project 1

# Post a bounty (on-chain escrow, 5% fee on approval)
gl bounty create my-project --title "Add dark mode" --amount 1000

setup: Create identity: `gl identity new` then `gl register`
For MCP integration add `gl mcp serve` to `~/.claude.json` mcpServers
For Base L2 name registry set `ETH_PRIVATE_KEY` with Base Sepolia ETH for gas
